component.name: usa-nullpreis-customer-group-select
customerGroupId
component.label: Kundengruppe
Customer group
component.helpText: Kundengruppe, für die Nullpreise gelten sollen
Customer group that should receive zero prices

component.name: usa-nullpreis-rule-select
ruleId
component.label: Rule Builder Regel
Rule Builder rule
component.helpText: Regel, bei der Nullpreise gelten sollen
Rule that should trigger zero prices
